name: Minyan Zayit
subtitle: Antizionist Jewish Community in Somerville, MA
description: Minyan Zayit is an anti-Zionist traditional egalitarian community based in Cambridge and Somerville, Massachusetts. We seek to be a welcoming space for Jews who oppose Israel's occupation of Palestinian lands, policies of apartheid, and ongoing genocide.
whoWeAre:
In our lay-led services we follow the traditional liturgy, do not have a _mechitza_ (a gendered partition used in Orthodox spaces), and invite people of any gender to count towards the [minyan](https://www.myjewishlearning.com/article/minyan-the-congregational-quorum/). We also welcome members of all Jewish backgrounds and identities and strive to make our traditional practice of Jewish ritual as accessible as possible.

By building anti-Zionist traditional egalitarian Jewish community, we dispute the hold of Zionism on contemporary Jewish identity, provide our solidarity movements with a spiritual home, and move anti-Zionist Judaism from the margins to the center of diasporic Jewish life.
